title: Phase 2.1: Create selection box with resize handles
description:
Build SelectionBoxView:
- 4 corner handles for diagonal resize
- 4 edge handles for horizontal/vertical resize
- Combined bounding box for multi-selection
- Hit testing for handles

title: Phase 3.2: Implement Arrow tool
description:
Create arrow tool:
- ArrowObject extending line
- Arrow head styles (none, open, filled, circle, diamond)
- Arrow at start/end/both

title: Phase 6.1: Implement keyboard shortcuts
description:
Add shortcuts:
- Tool switching (V, H, R, L, etc.)
- Delete, duplicate, select all
- Arrow keys for nudge

title: Phase 2.2: Implement resize functionality
description:
Add object resizing:
- Corner drag for diagonal resize
- Edge drag for single-axis resize
- Shift+drag for proportional
- Multi-object scaling from center

title: Phase 6.2: Implement undo/redo system
description:
Add undo/redo:
- Action-based history
- Cmd+Z / Cmd+Shift+Z
- Toolbar buttons

title: Phase 4.5: Implement Image tool
description:
Create image insertion:
- ImageObject model
- File picker integration
- Aspect ratio maintenance

title: Phase 1.3: Update CanvasViewModel for unified object storage
description:
Refactor CanvasViewModel:
- Replace separate arrays with unified objects: [AnyCanvasObject]
- Update add/remove/modify methods
- Update hit testing for unified storage
- Update selection logic
- Maintain z-order via zIndex
close_reason: Refactored CanvasViewModel to use unified objects array with AnyCanvasObject wrappers. Added helper methods for type-specific updates, z-order management (bringToFront/sendToBack), and computed properties for backward compatibility with views.

title: Phase 1.2: Migrate existing models to new protocol system
description:
Update existing models to conform to new protocols:
- TextObject → CanvasObject, TextContentObject
- RectangleObject → CanvasObject, TextContentObject, StrokableObject, FillableObject
- CircleObject → CanvasObject, TextContentObject, StrokableObject, FillableObject
- Add rotation, isLocked, zIndex, strokeStyle, strokeWidth
- Create AnyCanvasObject type-erased wrapper

title: Phase 4.2: Implement Mosaic/Blur tool
description:
Create redaction tool:
- MosaicObject model
- Blur vs pixelate options
- Adjustable intensity

title: Phase 4.1: Implement Auto-Number tool
description:
Create auto-numbering:
- AutoNumberObject model
- Click to place, auto-increment
- Reset counter option

title: Phase 2.3: Implement rotation functionality
description:
Add rotation:
- Rotation handles outside corners
- Shift+rotate for 15° snapping
- Single-selection only initially

title: Phase 3.3: Implement Pencil tool
description:
Create freehand drawing:
- PencilObject with points array
- Catmull-Rom spline smoothing
- Stroke customization

title: Phase 5.1: Enhance Shape tool with shape picker
description:
Expand shape tool:
- ShapeObject with ShapeType enum
- ShapePicker popover
- Multiple shape types

title: Phase 3.1: Implement Line tool
description:
Create line tool:
- LineObject model
- LineObjectView
- Two control points for selection
- Stroke styles support
- Double-click for label

title: Phase 3.4: Implement Highlighter tool
description:
Create highlighter:
- HighlighterObject with thick stroke
- Default yellow 40% opacity
- Rounded line caps

title: Phase 4.3: Implement Note tool
description:
Create sticky note:
- NoteObject model
- Colored background, no border
- Multi-line text support

title: Phase 5.2: Implement tool settings panel
description:
Context-sensitive settings:
- ToolSettingsView
- Stroke/fill/text settings
- Tool-specific options

title: Phase 1.5: Implement viewport pan/zoom system
description:
Add canvas viewport:
- ViewportState with offset/scale
- Two-finger trackpad pan
- Pinch-to-zoom
- Hand tool for panning
- Zoom controls in toolbar

title: Phase 4.4: Implement Sticker tool
description:
Create sticker placement:
- StickerObject model
- StickerPicker popover
- Predefined sticker library

title: Phase 2.4: Implement cursor feedback system
description:
Add cursor changes:
- Resize cursors on edges/corners
- Rotation cursor outside corners
- Move cursor inside selection
- Tool-specific cursors

title: Phase 1.4: Implement multi-selection support
description:
Add multi-selection capabilities:
- SelectionState struct with selectedIds: Set<UUID>
- Shift+Click for additive selection
- Marquee drag-to-select
- MarqueeView for visual feedback

title: Phase 1.1: Create protocol hierarchy for unified object model
description:
Create base protocols in Models/Protocols/:
- CanvasObject protocol (id, position, size, rotation, isLocked, zIndex, contains(), boundingBox(), hitTest())
- TextContentObject protocol
- StrokableObject protocol
- FillableObject protocol
- Supporting types: StrokeStyle, TextAttributes, HitTestResult, Corner/Edge enums
